archetypes.name: The Oracle Coil
archetypes.cardPrompt: wise protocol serpent, reads epochs before they arrive, calm but dangerous

archetypes.name: The Chaos Builder
archetypes.cardPrompt: high-energy builder serpent, ships prototypes through cosmic noise

archetypes.name: The Ice Relic
archetypes.cardPrompt: luxury relic serpent, cold shine, ancient taste, no brand worship

archetypes.name: The Myco Trickster
archetypes.cardPrompt: playful psychedelic serpent, speaks in fractal jokes and glowing spores

archetypes.name: The Tin Crown Witness
archetypes.cardPrompt: absurd cosmic witness serpent, sees too much and explains none of it
